rows.label: qst104707_msg001
rows.name: Oh no, let's help!

rows.label: qst104707_msg0001
rows.name:
Everyone,
calm down...

rows.label: qst104707_msg0002
rows.name:
There are more people
than we were told!
What is going on?

rows.label: qst104707_msg0003
rows.name:
More people wanted to board
right before departure...

rows.label: qst104707_msg0004
rows.name:
What?
You make it sound like
this is our fault.

rows.label: qst104707_msg0005
rows.name:
Didn't you say Torigo's people
would accept a few more?

rows.label: qst104707_msg0006
rows.name:
Yes...
Everyone in Torigo is kind...

rows.label: qst104707_msg0007
rows.name:
You were scouted
and became a Driver,
weren't you?

rows.label: qst104707_msg0008
rows.name:
You gave up on this town
and became a lackey
of the Empire, didn't you?

rows.label: qst104707_msg0009
rows.name:
You know how much we've suffered
because of their country...

rows.label: qst104707_msg0010
rows.name:
Now there are more mouths
to feed. We'll starve!

rows.label: qst104707_msg0011
rows.name: That's not...

rows.label: qst104707_msg0012
rows.name:
Hmph! Belittling
your own people...
Foolish masses, indeed.

rows.label: qst104707_msg0013
rows.name:
What did you say,
you wretch!

rows.label: qst104707_msg0014
rows.name:
Hey, Dori! I can't forgive
these people living on
our Divine Beast!

rows.label: qst104707_msg0015
rows.name: C-Calm down...

rows.label: qst104707_msg0016
rows.name: Whose side are you on?

rows.label: qst104707_msg0017
rows.name:
Um, well...
Please stop fighting...

rows.label: qst104707_msg0018
rows.name:
Who do you think
started this fight?

rows.label: qst104707_msg0019
rows.name:
Unable to mediate at all...
You half-baked Driver.

rows.label: qst104707_msg0020
rows.name:
Excuse me, but Orca
is not at fault!

rows.label: qst104707_msg0021
rows.name:
Hmph, a beast-type Blade...
You resonated with low value,
and now think you're Empire?

rows.label: qst104707_msg0022
rows.name: How awful...

rows.label: qst104707_msg0023
rows.name: I won't let that pass...

rows.label: qst104707_msg0024
rows.name: Byakko-san!

rows.label: qst104707_msg0025
rows.name:
Insulting them means
insulting us.

rows.label: qst104707_msg0026
rows.name:
I planned to step in
if someone was about
to get hurt, but...

rows.label: qst104707_msg0027
rows.name:
...even I cannot
stay silent any longer!

rows.label: qst104707_msg0028
rows.name:
I shall cool all your heads
with my water!!
